TRIAL CONTINUED BECAUSE NO COURTS AVAILABLE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACELLI, DALE MASKO, JEFFREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 649 PAGE #3, STAYED UNTIL JUL-18-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE PREMISES BROOM CLEAN ON TIME OR TO PAY $1000 BACK RENT & DAMAGES AT $150/MO START 8-15-95, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
